summary: Fixed two critical bugs: 1) Charts & Exhibits Hard drills now load correctly (was NameError), 2) Case Structuring drill labels now match time when clicking into drill (Easy=5min, Medium=10min, Hard=15min). Both backend and frontend fixes applied.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix: Added difficulty_labels_by_type and time_limits_by_type at module level in ai_drills.py (was only defined inside /list endpoint, causing NameError in /generate endpoint)
Frontend fix: Updated AIDrillModal.jsx to use time_limit from API response instead of hardcoded TIME_LIMITS based on difficulty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are now fixed. Charts & Exhibits Hard drills (ce-h-1 to ce-h-10) load correctly. Case Structuring drills show correct labels and times: Easy=5min, Medium=10min, Hard=15min.

bug_1_charts_exhibits_hard_drills.issue: Charts & Exhibits Hard drills showed 'Failed to Load - No drills available' error
bug_1_charts_exhibits_hard_drills.root_cause: NameError in /generate endpoint - difficulty_labels_by_type and time_limits_by_type were only defined inside /list endpoint, not at module level
bug_1_charts_exhibits_hard_drills.fix: Added difficulty_labels_by_type and time_limits_by_type dictionaries at module level in /app/backend/routes/ai_drills.py (after DRILL_TYPES definition)
bug_1_charts_exhibits_hard_drills.verification: All 10 Hard drills (ce-h-1 to ce-h-10) now load successfully with correct 'Hard' label and 900s (15 min) time

bug_2_case_structuring_labels.issue: Case Structuring labels were wrong when clicking into drill - Easy drills showed 15 min, Medium showed easy, Hard showed medium
bug_2_case_structuring_labels.root_cause: Frontend (AIDrillModal.jsx) was using hardcoded TIME_LIMITS based on difficulty instead of time_limit from API response
bug_2_case_structuring_labels.fix: Updated generateDrill() in AIDrillModal.jsx to use response.data.time_limit from API instead of hardcoded TIME_LIMITS[actualDifficulty]
bug_2_case_structuring_labels.verification: Case Structuring drills now show correct times: Easy=5min (4:58 timer), Medium=10min (9:58 timer), Hard=15min (14:58 timer)

ui_verification.charts_exhibits_hard_drill: Drill 21 loads with 14:58 timer (15 min), questions visible, no errors
ui_verification.case_structuring_easy_drill: Drill 1 loads with 4:58 timer (5 min), questions visible
ui_verification.case_structuring_medium_drill: Drill 9 loads with 9:58 timer (10 min), questions visible
